variables.input:
fetch dt.entity.host
| fields entity.name
| filterOut isNull(entity.name)
| sort entity.name asc
| summarize distinctHostNames = collectDistinct(entity.name)

timeseries {
Traffic = avg(dt.host.cpu.system),
Metric1 = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage),
Metric2 = avg(dt.host.memory.usage),
Metric3 = avg(dt.host.disk.free),
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }
},
interval: 5m
// Traffic
| fieldsAdd Traffic.Median = arrayAvg(Traffic)
| fieldsAdd Traffic.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(Traffic[] < Traffic.Median, Traffic[], else:null)))
| fieldsAdd Traffic.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(Traffic[] > Traffic.Median, Traffic[], else:null)))
| fieldsAdd Traffic.PercentChange = 100 * (Traffic.AvgHigherThanMedian - Traffic.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (Traffic.AvgLowerThanMedian)
// Metric1
| fieldsAdd Metric1.Median = arrayAvg(Metric1)
| fieldsAdd Metric1.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(Metric1[] < Metric1.Median, Metric1[], else:null)))
| fieldsAdd Metric1.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(Metric1[] > Metric1.Median, Metric1[], else:null)))
| fieldsAdd Metric1.PercentChange = 100 * (Metric1.AvgHigherThanMedian - Metric1.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (Metric1.AvgLowerThanMedian)
// Metric2
| fieldsAdd Metric2.Median = arrayAvg(Metric2)
| fieldsAdd Metric2.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(Metric2[] < Metric2.Median, Metric2[], else:null)))
| fieldsAdd Metric2.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(Metric2[] > Metric2.Median, Metric2[], else:null)))
| fieldsAdd Metric2.PercentChange = 100 * (Metric2.AvgHigherThanMedian - Metric2.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (Metric2.AvgLowerThanMedian)
// Metric3
| fieldsAdd Metric3.Median = arrayAvg(Metric3)
| fieldsAdd Metric3.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(Metric3[] < Metric3.Median, Metric3[], else:null)))
| fieldsAdd Metric3.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(Metric3[] > Metric3.Median, Metric3[], else:null)))
| fieldsAdd Metric3.PercentChange = 100 * (Metric3.AvgHigherThanMedian - Metric3.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (Metric3.AvgLowerThanMedian)
// Pearson Correlation Coefficient ΓÇö Metric1 vs Traffic
| fieldsAdd pcc.n = toDouble(arraySize(arrayRemoveNulls(iCollectArray(if(isNotNull(Metric1[]) AND isNotNull(Traffic[]), 1, else:null)))))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumXY = arraySum(iCollectArray(Metric1[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX = arraySum(Metric1), pcc.sumY = arraySum(Traffic)
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Metric1[] * Metric1[])), pcc.sumY2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Traffic[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd Metric1.PCC = (pcc.n * pcc.sumXY - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumY) / sqrt((pcc.n * pcc.sumX2 - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumX) * (pcc.n * pcc.sumY2 - pcc.sumY * pcc.sumY))
| fieldsRemove pcc.n, pcc.sumXY, pcc.sumX, pcc.sumY, pcc.sumX2, pcc.sumY2
// Pearson Correlation Coefficient ΓÇö Metric2 vs Traffic
| fieldsAdd pcc.n = toDouble(arraySize(arrayRemoveNulls(iCollectArray(if(isNotNull(Metric2[]) AND isNotNull(Traffic[]), 1, else:null)))))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumXY = arraySum(iCollectArray(Metric2[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX = arraySum(Metric2), pcc.sumY = arraySum(Traffic)
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Metric2[] * Metric2[])), pcc.sumY2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Traffic[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd Metric2.PCC = (pcc.n * pcc.sumXY - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumY) / sqrt((pcc.n * pcc.sumX2 - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumX) * (pcc.n * pcc.sumY2 - pcc.sumY * pcc.sumY))
| fieldsRemove pcc.n, pcc.sumXY, pcc.sumX, pcc.sumY, pcc.sumX2, pcc.sumY2
// Pearson Correlation Coefficient ΓÇö Metric3 vs Traffic
| fieldsAdd pcc.n = toDouble(arraySize(arrayRemoveNulls(iCollectArray(if(isNotNull(Metric3[]) AND isNotNull(Traffic[]), 1, else:null)))))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumXY = arraySum(iCollectArray(Metric3[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX = arraySum(Metric3), pcc.sumY = arraySum(Traffic)
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Metric3[] * Metric3[])), pcc.sumY2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Traffic[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd Metric3.PCC = (pcc.n * pcc.sumXY - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumY) / sqrt((pcc.n * pcc.sumX2 - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumX) * (pcc.n * pcc.sumY2 - pcc.sumY * pcc.sumY))
| fieldsRemove pcc.n, pcc.sumXY, pcc.sumX, pcc.sumY, pcc.sumX2, pcc.sumY2
// Build Array
| fields array(Traffic.Median, Traffic.AvgLowerThanMedian, Traffic.AvgHigherThanMedian, Traffic.PercentChange, Metric1.Median, Metric1.AvgLowerThanMedian, Metric1.AvgHigherThanMedian, Metric1.PercentChange, Metric2.Median, Metric2.AvgLowerThanMedian, Metric2.AvgHigherThanMedian, Metric2.PercentChange, Metric3.Median, Metric3.AvgLowerThanMedian, Metric3.AvgHigherThanMedian, Metric3.PercentChange, Metric1.PCC, Metric2.PCC, Metric3.PCC)

150.title: Memory % Top $TopN Entities (Last 7 Days)
150.description: Memory current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns by host. Click the host link to drill into Infrastructure and Operations for a host. Click the filter link to filter the dashboard for a host. The table time range is fixed for the last 7 days.
150.query:
timeseries {
  memUsage = avg(dt.host.memory.usage),  Traffic = avg(dt.host.cpu.system),
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }, by:{dt.entity.host}
},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
// Pearson Correlation Coefficient ΓÇö memUsage vs Traffic
| fieldsAdd pcc.n = toDouble(arraySize(arrayRemoveNulls(iCollectArray(if(isNotNull(memUsage[]) AND isNotNull(Traffic[]), 1, else:null)))))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumXY = arraySum(iCollectArray(memUsage[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX = arraySum(memUsage), pcc.sumY = arraySum(Traffic)
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(memUsage[] * memUsage[])), pcc.sumY2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Traffic[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd memUsage.PCC = (pcc.n * pcc.sumXY - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumY) / sqrt((pcc.n * pcc.sumX2 - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumX) * (pcc.n * pcc.sumY2 - pcc.sumY * pcc.sumY))
| fieldsRemove pcc.n, pcc.sumXY, pcc.sumX, pcc.sumY, pcc.sumX2, pcc.sumY2
| fieldsAdd memUsage.Median = arrayAvg(memUsage)
| fieldsAdd memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(memUsage[] < memUsage.Median, memUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd memUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(memUsage[] > memUsage.Median, memUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd memUsage.PercentChange = 100 * (memUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian - memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowTrafficMEM = memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(memUsage.PCC)*(memUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgTrafficMEM = memUsage.Median*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(memUsage.PCC)*(memUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficMEM = memUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(memUsage.PCC)*(memUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fields `Host Name` = concat("[",entityName(dt.entity.host),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Default#filtering=%22Host+name%22+%3D+",entityName(dt.entity.host),"+)"), `Pearson Correlation Coefficient` = memUsage.PCC, `Observed MEM Low` = memUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian, `Observed MEM Avg` = memUsage.Median, `Observed MEM High` = memUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian, `Forecasted Low MEM` = ForecastedLowTrafficMEM, `Forecasted Avg MEM` = ForecastedAvgTrafficMEM, `Forecasted High MEM` = ForecastedHighTrafficMEM, `Provisioning` = (toDouble($ProvisionGoal) -ForecastedHighTrafficMEM)
| sort `Pearson Correlation Coefficient` desc
| filterOut isNull(`Pearson Correlation Coefficient`)
| limit toLong($TopN)

151.title: Disk Free % Top $TopN Entities (Last 7 Days)
151.description: Disk Free current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns by host. Click the host link to drill into Infrastructure and Operations for a host. Click the filter link to filter the dashboard for a host. The table time range is fixed for the last 7 days.
151.query:
timeseries {
  diskFree = avg(dt.host.disk.used.percent),  Traffic = avg(dt.host.cpu.system), 
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]     
    }, by:{dt.entity.host}
},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
// Pearson Correlation Coefficient ΓÇö diskFree vs Traffic
| fieldsAdd pcc.n = toDouble(arraySize(arrayRemoveNulls(iCollectArray(if(isNotNull(diskFree[]) AND isNotNull(Traffic[]), 1, else:null)))))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumXY = arraySum(iCollectArray(diskFree[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX = arraySum(diskFree), pcc.sumY = arraySum(Traffic)
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(diskFree[] * diskFree[])), pcc.sumY2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Traffic[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd diskFree.PCC = (pcc.n * pcc.sumXY - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumY) / sqrt((pcc.n * pcc.sumX2 - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumX) * (pcc.n * pcc.sumY2 - pcc.sumY * pcc.sumY))
| fieldsRemove pcc.n, pcc.sumXY, pcc.sumX, pcc.sumY, pcc.sumX2, pcc.sumY2
| fieldsAdd diskFree.Median = arrayAvg(diskFree)
| fieldsAdd diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(diskFree[] < diskFree.Median, diskFree[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd diskFree.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(diskFree[] > diskFree.Median, diskFree[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd diskFree.PercentChange = 100 * (diskFree.AvgHigherThanMedian - diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowTrafficDiskFree = diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(diskFree.PCC)*(diskFree.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgTrafficDiskFree = diskFree.Median*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(diskFree.PCC)*(diskFree.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficDiskFree = diskFree.AvgHigherThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(diskFree.PCC)*(diskFree.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fields `Host Name` = concat("[",entityName(dt.entity.host),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Default#filtering=%22Host+name%22+%3D+",entityName(dt.entity.host),"+)"), `Pearson Correlation Coefficient` = diskFree.PCC, `Observed Disk Free Low` = diskFree.AvgLowerThanMedian, `Observed Disk Free Avg` = diskFree.Median, `Observed Disk Free High` = diskFree.AvgHigherThanMedian, `Forecasted Low Disk Free` = arrayMax(array(0, arrayMin(array(ForecastedLowTrafficDiskFree, 100)))), `Forecasted Avg Disk Free` = arrayMax(array(0, arrayMin(array(ForecastedAvgTrafficDiskFree, 100)))), `Forecasted High Disk Free` = arrayMax(array(0, arrayMin(array(ForecastedHighTrafficDiskFree, 100)))), `Provisioning` = (toDouble($ProvisionGoal) -ForecastedHighTrafficDiskFree)
| fieldsAdd `Disk Free Difference` = 100*(`Forecasted High Disk Free` - `Observed Disk Free High`)/`Observed Disk Free High`
| sort `Pearson Correlation Coefficient` desc
| filterOut isNull(`Pearson Correlation Coefficient`)
| limit toLong($TopN)

161.title: % Change
161.description: Forecasted metric for Disk Free Change (High) based on the simulated traffic change.
161.query:
data record("a", 1)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficDisk = toDouble(array($Metrics)[14])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[15])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fields diskPercentChange = (100 * (ForecastedHighTrafficDisk - toDouble(array($Metrics)[14]))/toDouble(array($Metrics)[14]))*toDouble(array($Metrics)[18])

171.description: The forecast high for CPU Usage based on the simulated traffic volume.

172.title: CPU Provisioning
172.description: Right size provisioning calculates the CPU capacity needed to support the simulated traffic volume. A positive red value indicates that your infrastructure is over provisioned and CPU capacity can be reduced by the chart value resulting in infrastructure savings.  A negative red value indicates that your infrastructure is under provisioned and CPU capacity will need to be increased by the chart value in order to support traffic volumes. A green value indicates that your CPUs are right sized.

173.title: Forecast High
173.description: The forecast high for Memory Usage based on the simulated traffic volume.

174.title: Memory Provisioning
174.description: Right size provisioning calculates the Memory capacity needed to support the simulated traffic volume. A positive red value indicates that your infrastructure is over provisioned and Memory capacity can be reduced by the chart value resulting in infrastructure savings.  A negative red value indicates that your infrastructure is under provisioned and Memory capacity will need to be increased by the chart value in order to support traffic volumes. A green value indicates that your Memory is right sized.

175.title: Disk Provisioning
175.description: Right size provisioning calculates the Disk capacity needed to support the simulated traffic volume. A positive red value indicates that your infrastructure is over provisioned and Disk capacity can be reduced by the chart value resulting in infrastructure savings.  A negative red value indicates that your infrastructure is under provisioned and Disk capacity will need to be increased by the chart value in order to support traffic volumes. A green value indicates that your Disks are right sized.

179.title: % Change
179.description: Forecasted metric for CPU Change (High) based on the simulated traffic change.
179.query:
data record("a", 1)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficCPU = toDouble(array($Metrics)[6])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[7])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fields cpuPercentChange = (100 * (ForecastedHighTrafficCPU - toDouble(array($Metrics)[6]))/toDouble(array($Metrics)[6]))*toDouble(array($Metrics)[16])

180.title: % Change
180.description: Forecasted metric for Memory Change (High) based on the simulated traffic change.
180.query:
data record("a", 1)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficMemory = toDouble(array($Metrics)[10])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[11])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fields memPercentChange = (100 * (ForecastedHighTrafficMemory - toDouble(array($Metrics)[10]))/toDouble(array($Metrics)[10]))*toDouble(array($Metrics)[17])

181.title: CPU Observed (Blue) vs Forecast (Green) For Traffic Patterns (Low, Avg, High)
181.description: CPU current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns.
181.query:
data record("a", 1)
| fieldsAdd ObservedLowCPU = toDouble(array($Metrics)[5])
| fieldsAdd ObservedAvgCPU = toDouble(array($Metrics)[4])
| fieldsAdd ObservedHighCPU = toDouble(array($Metrics)[6])
| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowCPU = toDouble(array($Metrics)[5])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[16])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[7])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgCPU = toDouble(array($Metrics)[4])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[16])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[7])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighCPU = toDouble(array($Metrics)[6])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[16])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[7])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd `Current Metric` = array("Observed Low","Observed Average","Observed High","Forecast Low","Forecast Average","Forecast High")
| expand `Current Metric`
| fieldsAdd `Metric Value` = if(`Current Metric` == "Observed Low", round(ObservedLowCPU, decimals: 2), 
			     else: if(`Current Metric` == "Observed Average", round(ObservedAvgCPU, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Observed High", round(ObservedHighCPU, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Forecast Low", round(ForecastedLowCPU, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Forecast Average", round(ForecastedAvgCPU, decimals: 2),
                                               else: round(ForecastedHighCPU, decimals: 2))))))
| fields `Current Metric`,`Metric Value`

182.title: Memory Observed (Blue) vs Forecast (Green) For Traffic Patterns (Low, Avg, High)
182.description: Memory current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns.
182.query:
data record("a", 1)

| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowMem = toDouble(array($Metrics)[9])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[17])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[11])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgMem = toDouble(array($Metrics)[8])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[17])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[11])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighMem = toDouble(array($Metrics)[10])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[17])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[11])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd `Current Metric` = array("Observed Low","Observed Average","Observed High","Forecast Low","Forecast Average","Forecast High")
| expand `Current Metric`
| fieldsAdd `Metric Value` = if(`Current Metric` == "Observed Low", round(ObservedLowMem, decimals: 2), 
			     else: if(`Current Metric` == "Observed Average", round(ObservedAvgMem, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Observed High", round(ObservedHighMem, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Forecast Low", round(ForecastedLowMem, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Forecast Average", round(ForecastedAvgMem, decimals: 2),
                                               else: round(ForecastedHighMem, decimals: 2))))))
| fields `Current Metric`,`Metric Value`

183.title: Disk Free Observed (Blue) vs Forecast (Green) For Traffic Patterns (Low, Avg, High)
183.description: Disk Free current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns.
183.query:
data record("a", 1)
| fieldsAdd ObservedLowDisk = toDouble(array($Metrics)[13])
| fieldsAdd ObservedAvgDisk = toDouble(array($Metrics)[12])
| fieldsAdd ObservedHighDisk = toDouble(array($Metrics)[14])
| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowDisk = toDouble(array($Metrics)[13])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[18])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[15])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgDisk = toDouble(array($Metrics)[12])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[18])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[15])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighDisk = toDouble(array($Metrics)[14])*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(array($Metrics)[18])*(toDouble(array($Metrics)[15])/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd `Current Metric` = array("Observed Low","Observed Average","Observed High","Forecast Low","Forecast Average","Forecast High")
| expand `Current Metric`
| fieldsAdd `Metric Value` = if(`Current Metric` == "Observed Low", round(ObservedLowDisk, decimals: 2), 
			     else: if(`Current Metric` == "Observed Average", round(ObservedAvgDisk, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Observed High", round(ObservedHighDisk, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Forecast Low", round(ForecastedLowDisk, decimals: 2),
			           else: if(`Current Metric` == "Forecast Average", round(ForecastedAvgDisk, decimals: 2),
                                               else: round(ForecastedHighDisk, decimals: 2))))))
| fields `Current Metric`,`Metric Value`

184.title: CPU % Top $TopN Entities (Last 7 Days)
184.description: CPU current and forecasted values for low, average and high traffic patterns by host. Click the host link to drill into Infrastructure and Operations for a host. Click the filter link to filter the dashboard for a host. The table time range is fixed for the last 7 days.
184.query:
timeseries {
  cpuUsage = avg(dt.host.cpu.usage), Traffic = avg(dt.host.cpu.system),
    filter:{
      dt.entity.host in [
        fetch dt.entity.host
        | filter matchesValue(entity.name, $Host)
        | fields id
      ]      
    }, by:{dt.entity.host}
},
union: TRUE,
interval: 5m
// Pearson Correlation Coefficient ΓÇö cpuUsage vs Traffic
| fieldsAdd pcc.n = toDouble(arraySize(arrayRemoveNulls(iCollectArray(if(isNotNull(cpuUsage[]) AND isNotNull(Traffic[]), 1, else:null)))))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumXY = arraySum(iCollectArray(cpuUsage[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX = arraySum(cpuUsage), pcc.sumY = arraySum(Traffic)
| fieldsAdd pcc.sumX2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(cpuUsage[] * cpuUsage[])), pcc.sumY2 = arraySum(iCollectArray(Traffic[] * Traffic[]))
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.PCC = (pcc.n * pcc.sumXY - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumY) / sqrt((pcc.n * pcc.sumX2 - pcc.sumX * pcc.sumX) * (pcc.n * pcc.sumY2 - pcc.sumY * pcc.sumY))
| fieldsRemove pcc.n, pcc.sumXY, pcc.sumX, pcc.sumY, pcc.sumX2, pcc.sumY2
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.Median = arrayAvg(cpuUsage)
| fieldsAdd traffic.Median = arrayAvg(Traffic)
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(cpuUsage[] < cpuUsage.Median, cpuUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian = arrayAvg(iCollectArray(if(cpuUsage[] > cpuUsage.Median, cpuUsage[], else: null)))
| fieldsAdd cpuUsage.PercentChange = 100 * (cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian - cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian) / (cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedLowTrafficCPU = cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*toDouble(cpuUsage.PCC)*(cpuUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedAvgTrafficCPU = cpuUsage.Median*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(cpuUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fieldsAdd ForecastedHighTrafficCPU = cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian*(1 + toDouble($TrafficChangePercent)*(cpuUsage.PercentChange/toDouble(array($Metrics)[3]))/100)
| fields `Host Name` = replaceString(concat("[",entityName(dt.entity.host),"](/ui/apps/dynatrace.infraops/explorer/Hosts?perspective=Default#filtering=%22Host+name%22+%3D+",entityName(dt.entity.host),"+)")," ","%20"), `Pearson Correlation Coefficient` = cpuUsage.PCC, `Observed CPU Low` = cpuUsage.AvgLowerThanMedian, `Observed CPU Avg` = cpuUsage.Median, `Observed CPU High` = cpuUsage.AvgHigherThanMedian, `Forecasted Low CPU` = ForecastedLowTrafficCPU, `Forecasted Avg CPU` = ForecastedAvgTrafficCPU, `Forecasted High CPU` = ForecastedHighTrafficCPU, `Provisioning` = (toDouble($ProvisionGoal) -ForecastedHighTrafficCPU)
| sort `Pearson Correlation Coefficient` desc
| filterOut isNull(`Pearson Correlation Coefficient`)
| limit toLong($TopN)
